data.title: Pfizer's New Chief Scientific Officer Charts R&D Vision For High And Low-Risk Investments
data.description: Pfizer's Chris Boshoff outlines plans to prioritize high-return projects, with a focus on obesity, Oncology, and oral GLP-1 therapies, amid Q3 growth.

data.title: Nebraska's Two-Front War On Cannabis
data.description: Nebraska: AG Mike Hilgers leads the fight against cannabis rescheduling, representing the state in the DEA hearing with prohibitionist SAM.

data.title: Marvell Stock Builds Momentum Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Marvell Tech (MRVL) reports Q3 earnings on Tues. Stock up 86.35% YoY. Charts show strong bullish momentum, above key SMAs. Analysts see 17% upside with Buy rating and $93.88 PT.
